codes.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
codes.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
codes.VALIDATION: Check the form and try again.
codes.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with existing data.
codes.SEATS_EXHAUSTED: No seats available on your plan. Upgrade to invite more members.
codes.PLAN_DOWNGRADE_BLOCKED: Too many members for the target plan. Remove members before downgrading.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: You have reached a usage limit for your plan.
codes.UNAVAILABLE: The service is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
codes.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reasons.sessionStale: Your session is out of date (often after a local database reset). Sign out, sign in again, then retry.
reasons.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
reasons.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reasons.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
reasons.cannotRevokeCurrentSession: You cannot revoke your current session.
reasons.inviteConflict: This email is already a member or has a pending invite.
reasons.seatsExhausted: No seats available. Upgrade your plan.
reasons.invitationNotFound: Invitation not found or already revoked.
reasons.ownerCannotRemove: The workspace owner cannot be removed.
reasons.invalidMemberRole: Role must be admin or member.
reasons.ownerRoleCannotChange: The workspace owner role cannot be changed.
reasons.workspaceNameInvalid: Name must be between 2 and 64 characters.
reasons.workspaceSlugInvalid: Slug must be 2–48 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
reasons.workspaceSlugTaken: This workspace URL is already taken.
reasons.billingDowngradeOnly: Only downgrades are supported on this action.
reasons.billingPlanDowngradeBlocked: Too many members for the target plan. Remove members before downgrading.
reasons.billingUseStripePortal: Plan changes for paid subscriptions are managed in the Stripe customer portal.
reasons.billingNoActiveSubscription: No active subscription to cancel. Upgrade via checkout first.
reasons.billingCancelFailed: Could not cancel the subscription. Try again in a moment.
reasons.billingSeatSyncFailed: Could not update subscription seats. Try again in a moment.
reasons.billingNotPerSeatPlan: Seat billing applies only on the Team plan.
reasons.billingSubscriptionNotBillable: Subscription cannot be changed while canceled or past due. Open Billing to fix payment.
reasons.billingTeamSeatCapReached: Team plan supports at most 50 seats.
reasons.billingInvoicesUnavailable: Could not load invoices. Try again in a moment.
reasons.billingNoCustomer: No billing customer linked to this workspace yet.
reasons.paymentCardholderRequired: Enter the name on the card.
reasons.emailQuotaMonthly: Monthly email quota exceeded ({{monthlyCount}} / {{monthlyLimit}}). Upgrade on Usage or Billing.
reasons.emailQuotaExceeded: Email quota exceeded for your plan.
reasons.supportMessageMinLength: Message must be at least 20 characters.
reasons.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Set URL and publishable key in apps/web/src/app/supabase.settings.ts.
reasons.supabaseWritesNotEnabled: This action is not available until organization write APIs are enabled.
reasons.passwordRecoveryInactive: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
reasons.emailConfirmationRequired: Check your email to confirm your account before signing in.
reasons.sessionRevokeNotSupported: Session management is not available in the local Supabase stack yet.
reasons.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
